headline_judge: independent dynamic-MC macrostate basin first-hitting, full physics (workflow §1.3)
mainline_policy: ESP/ESD-GNN = ESDGNN(use_cdq=False); Guarded-CDQ2 is an optional extension arm only
compute_note: Full-physics training ~18-22s/step@N=120 (~linear in N); MC ~0.4s/trial@N=120 (~linear). The publication-grade ideal is hundreds of GPU-hours; every run is BOUNDED + explicitly labeled compute-limited (workflow §9.1); the harness is built to the full design.

evidence.canonical_path: train_with_curve uses the SAME run_consensus_episode + macrostate_metrics + macrostate_lagrangian + MacrostateDuals as train_macrostate, full physics (train==eval), with a persistent optimizer + held-out analytic validation hook (screening only; dynamic MC is the final judge).
evidence.regime: iid @N=120 is near-ceiling (analytic Pc~1.0 both GNN+distance, no headroom -- workflow §5.3); switched to mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 where distance analytic Pc=0.42, F_deadline=0.56, F_wrong=0.016 (room, deadline-dominated, reliability-safe).
evidence.bounded: 3 model seeds (headline target >=5), single training scale N=120, 50 steps, budgets {5,15,30,50} -- compute-limited; mixed-scale + >=5 seeds + structured-regime sweeps are follow-up passes.
evidence.result: FLAT budget curve: GNN macro_P_correct=0.422 at every budget = distance heuristic 0.423. Loss rises only via dual mu_d ascent (F_deadline=0.56 >> eps_d); primal does not move. Analytic peer-insensitivity: 5 structurally-different heuristics give identical analytic Pc across regimes (ceiling/floor/invariant, spread <=0.002).

evidence.finding: TRAINING-SIGNAL GAP (workflow §13.3), confirmed by the dynamic-MC judge. Under MC (full physics, 100x2 scenes, N=120) peer selection clearly matters: iid_easy distance 0.995 [0.972,0.999] vs load_balanced 0.920 [0.874,0.950] -> spread 0.075, CI-SEPARATED; mm_high_R6 distance 0.445 vs region_bridge 0.360 -> spread 0.085. But the analytic TRAINING surrogate gave all heuristics identical Pc (spread <=0.002). The mean-field analytic episode washes out the polling-pattern effect the subset-sampling MC resolves -> the GNN trained on the surrogate has no gradient toward what the judge rewards -> the EV1 flat curve. Distance is the best simple heuristic under MC; beating it via a learned policy cannot be reached through this surrogate.
evidence.verdict: STOP+REPORT (stop-condition #1/#2): trained ESP/ESD-GNN performance SUPERIORITY cannot be established with the current training signal. Honest contribution available now: the evaluator/diagnostic + the training-signal-gap finding + the §13.2 'stable learned constructor that matches strong heuristics' framing. Direction is the user's call.
evidence.namespace_clean: headroom_mc_results.json: forbidden=[] legacy=[]; macro blocks validated; manifest hash-bound (EV2-headroom-mc).

modules: src/optimization/mc_reinforce.py (batched_subset_log_prob + train_esp_reinforce, per-node credit + participation weighting)
src/validation/dynamic_mc.py (gated reinforce=True: differentiable per-(trial,node) sum log pi + per-node correct reward; judge default path unchanged)
tests: tests/optimization/test_mc_reinforce.py (5: log-prob vs reference + mask + normalised/differentiable; judge-invariant under reinforce; a step trains)

evidence.finding: GAP CLOSING via per-node-credit REINFORCE. mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 N=120, held-out MC 200x2 trials: GNN init Pc=0.370 (~uniform 0.368). Network-level REINFORCE (one reward/trial across all nodes) -> 0.370, delta +0.000 (gradient is MC sampling noise; the env-domination of EV2 as a credit-assignment problem). Per-node REINFORCE (each node credited by its own correct finalisation, omega-weighted, per-node baseline) -> 0.392, delta +0.022 toward distance 0.427 in 40 bounded steps. The variance reduction was the key.
evidence.honest_caveat: delta +0.022 is a real positive direction but NOT yet CI-separated at 400 eval trials (init [0.32,0.42] vs trained [0.34,0.44]); 1 model seed (compute-limited). Longer multi-seed confirmation needed to CI-separate + reach distance.
evidence.judge_integrity: the reinforce mode is gated; a test asserts reinforce=False/True give bit-identical basins; the 82-test MC/metrics regression is clean.

evidence.finding: GAP CLOSING CONFIRMED, reproducibly + monotonically. mm_high(0.35,0.25) R_d=6 N=120, held-out MC 200x2 trials: per-node-credit REINFORCE trains the GNN from init 0.370 (~uniform 0.368) to seed0 0.415 / seed1 0.405 (mean 0.410, +0.040) at 80 steps = ~96% of distance (0.427). Monotone in budget: 40 steps -> 0.392, 80 steps -> 0.410. The analytic surrogate AND network-level REINFORCE were flat here.
evidence.honest_caveat: NOT yet CI-separated: per-seed Wilson CIs overlap at 400 eval trials (init [0.324,0.418] vs trained [0.368,0.464]); +0.040 < eval CI +/-0.048. Evidence for closing rests on reproducibility (2 seeds) + monotonicity (in steps), not a single CI-separated comparison. 2 model seeds (headline target >=5): compute-limited.
evidence.verdict: G-ESP-MC-FAITHFUL-TRAINING core goal MET (a working MC-faithful trainer that closes the gap). Promoting to a CI-separated >=5-seed reaches/beats-distance headline + re-running budget/scale gates with MC-faithful checkpoints is substantial additional compute -> user investment decision (workflow 9.1).
